title: Bitfarms Stock Forecast 2026 Future Outlook via Capital.com
text: Capital.com provides Bitfarms stock forecast and future outlook for 2026 reflecting company transformation from Bitcoin mining to HPC/AI infrastructure. The forecast considers strategic announcements including U.S. redomiciliation planned for April 2026 and rebranding to Keel Infrastructure. Stock price targets and forecast models incorporate analyst expectations for revenue growth from HPC/AI operations expansion and continued Bitcoin mining cash generation. The outlook reflects company's pipeline of 2.1 GW power capacity with 90% U.S.-based, providing foundation for substantial HPC/AI infrastructure deployment. Capital expenditure requirements estimated at under $100 million for 2025 supported by Paraguay facility divestiture proceeds. Forecast incorporates Bitcoin mining profitability assumptions based on cost structure and expected BTC prices. Margin expectations addressed potential compression from HPC/AI infrastructure depreciation but also considered higher revenue opportunities from compute services. Capital structure assessment included debt facility with Macquarie Group providing $300 million for HPC project financing. Liquidity analysis addressed cash position and BTC treasury supporting operations and capital deployment. Technical analysis and price action patterns assessed historical trading ranges and potential support/resistance levels.
